title: Mudhal Mazhai Lyrics Bheema
stanzas:
en vaasalil nettru
un vaasanai..
nee nindra idam
indru unarthen..

edhuvum puriya pudhu kavithai..
artham motham indru arindhen..
kaiyyai meerum oru kudaiyaai..
kaattroduthaan naanum paranthen..
mazhai kaattroduthaan
naanum paranthen..

ornaal unnai
naanum kaanavittaal..
en vaazhvil andha
naaley illaiiii..
ornaal unnai
naanum partheyvittaal..
annaalin neelam podhavillai

iravum pagalum oru mayakkam..
neengaamaley nenjil irukkum..
uyirinulley undhan nerukkam..
irandhaalume endrum irukkum..
naan irandhaalume endrm irukkum..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mudhal Mazhai?

Mudhal Mazhai conveys the feelings of love and nostalgia, depicting how love transforms one's life.

What is the context of this song in the movie Bheema?

In Bheema, this song highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional connection.

Who are the singers of Mudhal Mazhai?

The song is beautifully sung by Hariharan and Mahathi, whose voices complement each other perfectly.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mudhal Mazhai was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his melodious tunes.

When was Mudhal Mazhai released?

Mudhal Mazhai was released on January 19, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mudhal Mazhai, the protagonists express their deep feelings for each other through heartfelt lyrics and soothing melodies. The song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love, longing, and connection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As the characters navigate their relationship, this melody serves as a backdrop to their journey, evoking a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The collaboration of talented artists enhances the overall experience, leaving a lasting impression on the audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mudhal Mazhai from the movie Bheema is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and Mahathi, this song creates an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The collaboration of talented lyricist Na Muthukumar and music director Harrish Jeyaraj adds a unique charm to this romantic melody.
stanzaMeanings: The first rain remembers us.. the window that was closed has opened..
The bird that doesn't know its name has called.. the heart has also flown away..
The heart.. hmm.. has become like this....
You are the one who appeared in my dreams.. I captured you with my eyes..
Yesterday, your scent was at my door.. today, I realize where you stood..
Nothing is understood, it's a new poem.. today I understood the whole meaning.. I also showed it as a bucket that lifts my hand.. I also showed it as rain..
The first rain remembers me.. the first window has opened..
The bird that doesn't know its name has called.. the heart has also flown away.. The heart.. oh.. has become like this..
If I see you tomorrow.. that day won't exist in my life.. If I see you tomorrow.. then there won't be a place for the past..
Night and day are a kind of illusion.. without you, it will remain in my heart.. within my life, your presence will always be there.. even if I am there, it will always be there..
The bird that doesn't know its name has called.. The heart.. oh.. has become like this..
